---
title: "Jiho Min"
image: profile.png
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-copy">
    <p class="eyebrow">16-year-old developer portfolio</p>
    <h1>Hi, I'm Jiho Min.</h1>
    <p class="hero-lead">
      I build useful web apps, data tools, and digital experiences that connect
      technology with school life, sports, finance, and learning.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-actions" aria-label="Profile links">
      <a class="button primary" href="https://github.com/jiho-m0521" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub</a>
      <a class="button secondary" href="mailto:kr.jiho0521@gmail.com">Email</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-profile">
    <img src="profile.png" alt="Portrait of Jiho Min">
    <div class="quick-facts">
      <div>
        <span class="fact-label">Focus</span>
        <strong>Web apps and data</strong>
      </div>
      <div>
        <span class="fact-label">Location</span>
        <strong>South Korea / U.S.</strong>
      </div>
      <div>
        <span class="fact-label">Current Role</span>
        <strong>Student developer</strong>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="about" class="section-panel">
  <div class="section-heading">
    <p class="eyebrow">About</p>
    <h2>Developer, student, and translator.</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="section-body two-column">
    <p>
      I am a 16-year-old South Korean-American student who enjoys turning ideas
      into practical software. I like building products that are easy to use,
      well organized, and connected to real people around me.
    </p>
    <p>
      My interests include web development, Python apps, financial markets,
      data visualization, and international communication. Outside of coding, I
      contribute as a translator for global websites and keep learning across
      technology, economics, and design.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="projects" class="section-panel">
  <div class="section-heading">
    <p class="eyebrow">Project Portfolio</p>
    <h2>Selected work</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="project-grid">
    <article class="project-card featured">
      <div>
        <p class="project-type">Web application</p>
        <h3>Seocho Middle School Soccer Club Website</h3>
        <p>
          A full soccer team platform with team information, match schedules,
          player profiles, and performance statistics. Built as a solo project
          with a focus on real team operations and clear data presentation.
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="project-meta">
        <span>Python</span>
        <span>Streamlit</span>
        <span>Pandas</span>
        <span>Plotly</span>
      </div>
      <div class="project-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/jiho-m0521/seochofc" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub Repository</a>
        <a href="https://seochofc.streamlit.app" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Live Demo</a>
      </div>
    </article>

    <article class="project-card">
      <div>
        <p class="project-type">Learning lab</p>
        <h3>Finance and Data Experiments</h3>
        <p>
          Small projects and notebooks for understanding markets, analyzing
          data, and practicing how to explain complex information visually.
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="project-meta">
        <span>Python</span>
        <span>Pandas</span>
        <span>Matplotlib</span>
      </div>
    </article>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="skills" class="section-panel">
  <div class="section-heading">
    <p class="eyebrow">Tech Stack</p>
    <h2>Tools I use to build.</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <div class="skill-group">
      <h3>Mobile and Game</h3>
      <div class="skill-list">
        <span>Flutter</span>
        <span>Dart</span>
        <span>Android</span>
        <span>Kotlin</span>
        <span>Unity</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-group">
      <h3>Web and Backend</h3>
      <div class="skill-list">
        <span>Python</span>
        <span>Django</span>
        <span>Streamlit</span>
        <span>HTML5</span>
        <span>Flet</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-group">
      <h3>Data and Design</h3>
      <div class="skill-list">
        <span>Pandas</span>
        <span>Plotly</span>
        <span>Matplotlib</span>
        <span>LaTeX</span>
        <span>Canva</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-group">
      <h3>Tools and Automation</h3>
      <div class="skill-list">
        <span>GitHub</span>
        <span>Quarto</span>
        <span>Netlify</span>
        <span>Notion</span>
        <span>Zapier</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
